Title: Trespassers Detected at [Location]
Security Post Breached
[Location] Infiltrated
Break In At [Location]
Description:
We just received word that [Location] has been breached by an unknown number of [Client]. Although it's unclear what exactly they're hoping to accomplish, I am pretty darn certain it's nothing good.

Since we can't really have a bunch of hoods running around our unopened security station, Crusader is forming a combat response team ASAP. Grab whatever gear you'll need and head over to [Location] on the double. [CombatPay]And please, try to be safe!

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

The security system on [Location] was just tripped by intruders identified as members of the [Client]. Let me tell you from personal experience, these are some serious, no-good low-lifes. As you can imagine, Crusader Security is pretty eager to contract a team to head over and clear them out. [CombatPay]

If you're interested, hurry and grab whatever gear you'll need. It'd be great if we could settle this whole thing as quickly and safely as possible.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Bautista
ID# 948J030K

Members of a local criminal outfit, the [Client], were spotted breaking into one our stations. To deal with these dirtbag trespassers, a small team is being assembled to go in and clear them out of [Location].  [CombatPay] 

Now, since we're in a rush, figured it couldn't hurt to cast a wide net to all contractors in the area, regardless of skill or track record. If you're available — and I'm assuming you are — hurry up and grab your equipment. Hate to think about the kind of damage these [Client] could be doing.


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Gibbs
ID# 91G66BW0

Moments ago, one of our offline stations was infilitrated by a crew believed to be part of the [Client]. It's important that they're not allowed to carry out whatever criminal action they are planning. 

To that end, we're assembling a squad of armed and trained operators to secure and eliminate any criminal elements present at [Location]. [CombatPay]Contractors are expected to provide their own transportation and weapons. They are also expected to be able to look after themselves. Please do us all a favor and don't take this job if you can't handle it.


CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Gibbs
ID# 91G66BW0
CombatPay: In addition to the standard contract payment, there will be a bonus issued for each combatant you successfully neutralize.
Unfortunately, we've been unable to determine the size of the force you'll be up against, but will issue you Hazard Pay for each hostile you manage to deal with successfully.
I've also been cleared to issue Hazard Pay that scales for each outlaw you take care of.
And to preemptively answer your question, yes, in addition to the normal flat fee there will be Hazard Pay issued for each hostile you clear from the site.
